basic_info.description: 👋 I'm Alexander Njuguna, I am responsible for developing fast, Intuitive and reliable User Interfaces. I have been working as a software developer since 2017, I have particularly gained extensive experience in Frontend development and I have worked with several technologies including React, Next.js, typescript , tailwind , sass and currently learning vue js. Over the past 2 years I've developed interest and curiosity in enhancing user interaction on the web hence working on extending my knowledge in UI/UX design. Apart from engineering, I also enjoy hiking and nature trailing and once in a while camping.

projects.title: Athena
projects.description: One of the most interesting projects I worked on. This application is a God-mode power BI tool. It analyses data and provide statistics visualization of the data using AI.

projects.title: Cars App
projects.description: Personal project for study subject. I was responsible for developing an application that list out cars on sale .  The application consists of two sections: dealers and orders with typical CRUD operations. It's also possible to filter data in the tables.I've earned A grade :)

projects.title: Kejacop
projects.description: Kejacop is a property search and property management sass company. My role on this project included ideation, design and development.

projects.title: BSC scorecard
projects.description: One of the first apps I was working on my role at Quantrica. I had to develop front-end implementation for app that shows employees performance scorecard based on BSC scoring metrics. This was also my first project in GraphQl. I've learned a lot!

projects.title: Buy it - ecommerce
projects.description: This is an ecommerce application I developed with react and next. The purpose of this application was to improve screen response to device change and sharpen my skills in web development.
